_comment: Manually-sourced final 26-man squads for teams whose squads were not present (or only preliminary) in reference/wc2026.html. Merged on top of the HTML-derived squads by scripts/extract-tournament.mjs. Sourced June 2026 from Wikipedia '2026 FIFA World Cup squads' cross-checked with federation/press reports.

Algeria.status: Announced squad (reported as 27; final cut to 26 unconfirmed from sources)
